text.title: Meta Audience Targeting (Granular) Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding the meta-audience-targeting methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Interest stacks MUST be 2-3 broad themes (OR'd, not AND'd). AND-stacking interests is forbidden — kills audience size.
rule.rationale: AND-stacking historically shrinks audiences below 500K → CPM spike.

rule.statement: Behavioral filters MUST be selected from the iOS-safe list (engaged shoppers, returned travelers, etc); volatile filters (page-visit-7d) are forbidden post-iOS 14.5.
rule.rationale: Volatile filters under-deliver after iOS attribution loss; safe list still works.

rule.statement: Advantage+ Audience MUST be reserved for broad-appeal products with daily budget ≥$100; niche products MUST stay manual.
rule.rationale: Advantage+ over-explores; cheap volume, expensive quality for niche.

rule.statement: Each funnel stage MUST exclude: TOFU = current customers + recent converters; MOFU = purchasers 30d; BOFU = converters 7d.
rule.rationale: Per-stage exclusion prevents re-ad and protects retention.

rule.statement: Dynamic creative MUST be enabled ONLY with broad audiences (Advantage+ or tier-2 Custom). On narrow audiences it over-fits.
rule.rationale: Dynamic creative needs volume to learn; narrow audience starves it.
